## Root Cause
The error is caused by the inability to install a required library from a custom wheelhouse directory due to a mismatch in the Python version or platform architecture.

## Explanation
The Databricks notebook is trying to install libraries from a custom wheelhouse directory, but it's failing because the wheel files in the directory are not compatible with the Python version or platform architecture being used by the serverless compute.

## Fix Description
The fix involves ensuring that the wheel files in the wheelhouse directory are compatible with the Python version and platform architecture used by the serverless compute. This can be achieved by regenerating the wheelhouse directory with the correct Python version and platform architecture.

## Corrected Code

%pip install -r serverless_requirements.txt --target /tmp --platform manylinux2014_x86_64 --python-version 312 --only-binary=:all: --upgrade
